product_overview: Lakoku is an interactive Indonesian story product that lets readers explore public stories, create private personalized stories, and clone premium templates into private instances. Readers can branch through chapters, wait for generated continuations, and finish stories with completion actions while keeping private content ownership-safe.
core_goals: Explore public stories from the landing and browse experience
Create private personalized stories for signed-in users
Clone public premium templates into private story instances
Read stories with branching choices and continued chapter generation
Review exact chapter generation status while waiting for the next chapter
Complete a story on the final chapter and access follow-up actions
Keep the explore feed public-only and the library ownership-safe
Prevent internal generation and ownership data from appearing in reader-facing responses

features.name: Landing and navigation shell
features.description: Gives visitors a starting point to enter the app, browse public stories, begin onboarding, or access authentication when needed.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Observe landing content and entry options -> Continue to public browsing or onboarding
Navigate to / -> Choose to explore stories -> Arrive at /beranda and browse the public feed
Navigate to / -> Choose to start onboarding -> Arrive at /mulai and begin the personalized story flow
Navigate to / -> Choose account access -> Arrive at /auth/login or /auth/sign-up and continue authentication

features.name: Public explore and story detail browsing
features.description: Lets users browse only public stories and open public story detail pages without exposing private personalized content.
user_flows: Navigate to /beranda -> Browse the public story feed -> Open a public story detail -> Read story information and continue to reading when available
Navigate to /beranda -> Browse public templates and stories -> Open a story detail -> Confirm the story is publicly accessible
Navigate to /cerita/[id] -> Open a public story detail -> Continue into the reader when the story provides a readable chapter

features.name: Personalized story creation
features.description: Allows signed-in users to create a private personalized story and immediately begin reading Chapter 1.
user_flows: Navigate to /mulai -> Begin the personalized onboarding flow -> Sign in when the app requires persistence -> Wait for story creation to complete -> Open the first chapter in the reader
Navigate to /mulai -> Continue the onboarding flow as a guest -> Reach the login boundary when persistence is needed -> Sign in -> Resume the private creation flow
Navigate to /mulai -> Start personalized story creation -> Wait for the first chapter to be generated -> Open /baca/[id] and read Chapter 1

features.name: Premium template clone
features.description: Allows signed-in users to clone a public premium template into a private instance and read its first chapter.
user_flows: Navigate to /cerita/[id] -> Open a public premium template detail -> Clone the template into a private instance -> Wait for the clone to complete -> Read the cloned Chapter 1
Navigate to /cerita/[id] -> Open the same premium template again -> Repeat the clone action with the same idempotency key -> Confirm the private instance remains consistent

features.name: Reader branching choice and chapter continuation
features.description: Lets readers make story choices, see processing feedback, and move forward when the next chapter is ready.
user_flows: Navigate to /baca/[id] -> Read the chapter prose -> Select a branching choice -> See the selected feedback and processing state -> Wait while the next chapter is generated -> Open the next chapter when it becomes ready

Navigate to /baca/[id] -> Read the chapter prose -> Select a branching choice -> See the choice enter a pending state -> Retry the choice if the user input needs another attempt -> Continue reading once the next chapter is ready
Navigate to /baca/[id] -> Read a non-final chapter -> Choose a branch -> Poll for the next chapter status -> Move to the next chapter when generation completes

features.name: Final chapter completion experience
features.description: Shows a choice-free ending state on the final chapter and offers actions to return to the library or start a new story.
user_flows: Navigate to /baca/[id] on the final chapter -> Read the ending content -> Confirm that no choice options are shown -> Return to the library from the completion screen
Navigate to /baca/[id] on the final chapter -> Read the ending content -> Confirm that no choice options are shown -> Start a new story from the completion screen

features.name: Ownership-safe library
features.description: Shows only stories owned by the signed-in user and keeps private personalized or premium instances out of public explore.
user_flows: Navigate to /koleksiku -> Sign in if required -> View the private library -> Open an owned private story
Navigate to /beranda -> Browse the public feed -> Confirm private personalized stories do not appear there
Navigate to /cerita/[id] -> Open a private story that belongs to the signed-in user -> Read the story detail successfully
Navigate to /cerita/[id] -> Attempt to open another user’s private story detail -> Confirm it is not accessible

features.name: Auth login and guest resume boundary
features.description: Provides email/password authentication and lets a guest continue until the app reaches a point where persistence is required.
user_flows: Navigate to /auth/login -> Enter email and password -> Submit the login form -> Resume the private story flow after sign-in
Navigate to /auth/sign-up -> Enter registration details -> Submit the sign-up form -> Continue into the app after account creation
Navigate to /mulai as a guest -> Progress through onboarding -> Reach the persistence boundary -> Sign in to continue

features.name: Credits and top-up surface
features.description: Exposes the credits area for users to inspect their available credits and access top-up related content.
user_flows: Navigate to /kredit -> View the credits surface -> Review current credit information -> Continue with available top-up actions

features.name: Profile and taste settings
features.description: Lets users open profile settings and manage taste preferences used for onboarding and personalization.
user_flows: Navigate to /profil -> Open profile settings -> Review taste preferences -> Adjust personalization-related settings
Navigate to /onboarding/selera -> Complete taste onboarding -> Save the selected preferences -> Continue into the personalized experience

routes.description: Landing page entry to mulai, beranda, and auth

routes.file: app/(shell)/../mulai or app/mulai page flow via components/mulai

routes.description: Explore/home feed of public demo and premium templates
Owner library of private personalized and premium instances
Story detail for public or owned private stories
Chapter reader with choices, pending retry, polling, final CTA
Ending screen after final chapter completion
Full authoring wizard for story bible planning

features.name: Landing and navigation shell
features.description: Public landing and shell navigation into mulai, beranda, library, and auth.
user_interactions: Navigate to Koleksiku or login when auth required

features.name: Personalized story creation
features.description: Authenticated private personalized_ai story creation with strong idempotency and Chapter 1 generation.
user_interactions: Start onboarding or personalized create flow
Sign in if guest hits lock/create boundary
Wait for story creation and first chapter

features.name: Premium template clone
features.description: Authenticated clone of public premium_template into private premium_instance with optional curated Chapter 1 reuse.
user_interactions: Replay clone with same idempotency key

features.name: Reader branching choice and continuation
features.description: Reader applies choices, stores pending retry, polls next chapter status, and advances when ready.
user_interactions: See selected feedback and processing state
Retry pending choice if network fails
Wait while next chapter is generating
Navigate to next chapter when ready

features.name: Final chapter no-choice completion
features.description: Final chapter hides choices and shows Library/New Story CTAs.

features.name: Ownership-safe Explore and Library
features.description: Explore only public official stories; library shows owned private personalized/premium instances.
user_interactions: Open owned private library after login
Confirm other users cannot open private stories

features.name: Privacy and internal-field protection
features.description: Reader-facing contracts and route bodies exclude internal generation/route/ownership fields.
user_interactions: Confirm no internal fields leak into UI payloads

features.name: Auth login and guest resume boundary
features.description: Guest can explore onboarding until lock/create; login required for persistence and private reads.
user_interactions: Resume onboarding or private library after session

features.name: Release and local quality gates
features.description: Local automated gates covering unit, smoke, DB, ownership, and authenticated HTTP e2e for Tasks 1-28.

known_limitations.issue: TestSprite previous report is from 2026-07-11 and does not cover personalized Tasks 19-28.
known_limitations.impact: Need fresh frontend plan/execution against current worktree.

known_limitations.issue: Guest cannot complete private personalized create or private library without credentials.
known_limitations.impact: Auth-gated flows may be marked failed/blocked by TestSprite without seeded login credentials.

known_limitations.issue: Local db reset alone lacks baseline stories schema and needs baseline restore before additive migrations.
known_limitations.impact: Local DB setup is non-trivial for browser automation environments.

known_limitations.issue: Production exposure still blocked by process authorization despite complete local gates.
known_limitations.impact: TestSprite pass is local evidence only, not production GO.
